name: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Organization Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, Energy Vault or the Company) is a Delaware corporation. On February 11, 2022, we completed a business combination with Energy Vault, Inc. (the Merger) and, in connection with the closing, changed our name from Novus Capital Corporation II to Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. Mission Our mission is to build, own, and energize the worlds critical energy infrastructure. About Us Energy Vault delivers a diversified portfolio ...
